mapper.select: select count(1) from km_knowledge_base where is_deleted = 0
select count(1) from km_document where is_deleted = 0
select count(1) from km_document_chunk c join km_document d on d.id = c.doc_id where c.is_active = 1 and d.is_deleted = 0
select count(1) from km_document where is_deleted = 0 and document_status = #{status}
select count(1) from km_document_process_task where task_status in ('QUEUED','RUNNING')

select date_format(created_at, '%Y-%m-%d') as date, count(1) as count from km_document where created_at >= str_to_date(#{fromDate}, '%Y-%m-%d') and created_at < date_add(str_to_date(#{toDate}, '%Y-%m-%d'), interval 1 day) group by date_format(created_at, '%Y-%m-%d') order by date asc
